data.body: CUTOVER ATTESTATION (operator-performed 2026-07-12): pushed infra/gerrit/project.config to live refs/meta/config as admin JoeOakhartNava (d9bb36596 -> 2415e53f7, DCO-signed). VERIFIED: (1) GET /a/projects/rebar/labels/Autosubmit = {function: NoBlock, values: -1/0/+1, default 0} — present + non-gating; (2) GET /a/projects/rebar/access diffed against committed infra/gerrit/access-snapshot-pre-autolander.json baseline: ONLY 2 new grants (label-Autosubmit on refs/heads/* for Contributors + Administrators, -1..+1 ALLOW), NO removals/changes — two-vote gate untouched. Change #582 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/582) LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (CI green). config-check Autosubmit-invariant guard passes.
